name: Chicken 'n Hash Brown Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw hash browns overnight in refrigerator.
2. Layer hash browns in an ungreased 9 x 13 pan.
3. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
4. Place chicken and mushrooms over the hash browns.
5. Stir together sour cream, broth, soup, bouillon, onion, red pepper, and garlic; pour over all.
6. Sprinkle with paprika and almonds.
7. Bake, uncovered, at 350°F for 50 - 60 minutes or until heated through.
